title: Demographic and clinical profile of an inception cohort of road trauma survivors.
author: Pei LX Chan H Shum LK Jae L Staples JA Taylor JA Harris DR Brubacher JR
content:
S-EPMC10422727 PMC10422727 Demographic and clinical profile of an inception cohort of road trauma survivors.

Background

Road trauma is a major public health concern, often resulting in reduced health-related quality of life and prolonged absenteeism from work even after so-called 'minor
